description_long: This is a modern, sleek, black military jet aircraft with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept wings. The jet features twin engines mounted at the rear, with visible exhausts and a pair of vertical stabilizers forming a distinctive H-tail configuration. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and positioned forward on the fuselage, providing excellent visibility for the pilot. Red markings, including the number '001' and Polish Air Force insignia, are prominently displayed on the tail and wings. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The overall design suggests a high-performance, agile aircraft suitable for advanced operations.
description: A black, twin-engine military jet with swept wings, H-tail, and forward enclosed cockpit, marked with red insignia and numbers. Features include visible landing gear and Polish Air Force emblems.
description_view_0: Side view showing the forward cockpit, swept wings, deployed landing gear, and red '001' marking on the tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin engine exhausts, H-tail configuration, and Polish insignia on the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit, landing gear, and tail markings.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, canopy, and symmetrical wing and tail arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted on either side of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed and deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
